diagram_title: Telemetry Context Sidebar Optimization — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Web App
systems.description: Browser UI for session, sidebar, and telemetry surfaces.

containers.name: Session UI Container
containers.description: SolidJS session pages and sidebar components inside packages/app.

components.name: Session Context Tab
components.description: Renders legacy context metrics, breakdown, prompt, and telemetry sections for the context sidebar.

components.name: Telemetry Cards
components.description: Reusable card components for prompt, round/session, and quota telemetry surfaces.

components.name: Layout Store
components.description: Persists sidebar layout state and is the likely source for storing context card order.

components.name: Session Side Panel Route
components.description: Hosts the desktop context sidebar surface and passes session state into the context tab.

components.name: Session Tool Page Route
components.description: Hosts the mobile/tool-page context surface and mirrors context-tab usage.

components.name: Status Sidebar Pattern
components.description: Existing sortable status-sidebar card pattern used as the reference for context-card ordering.

relationships.description: aligns legacy cards with telemetry card styling
reads and writes context card order
